expectations.text: Uses the three named categories (AT RISK/BLOCKED, STALE, OVERDUE)
expectations.evidence: Output uses exactly '🔴 AT RISK / BLOCKED', '🟡 STALE (7+ days no update)', '⚠️ OVERDUE' headers.

expectations.text: STALE items identified as 7+ days no update
expectations.evidence: Each STALE bullet states days since last update (e.g. '~55 days ago').
No padding; closes with a single summary line about the long tail rather than narrating.
